minecraft:lore: {"text": "💰 售价：", "color": "white", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "无法出售", "color": "red", "bold": true}]}
{"text": "🔧 物品种类：", "color": "white", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "装备", "color": "light_purple", "bold": true}]}
{"text": "尤巴神的祝福庇护佩戴者。", "color": "gray", "italic": false}
{"text": "被动效果 - ", "color": "white", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "神圣庇护", "color": "gold", "bold": true}]}
{"text": "▪ 效果: ", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "低血量时获得短暂无敌", "color": "white", "bold": false}]}
{"text": "▪ 触发: ", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "生命值低于25%时触发", "color": "white", "bold": false}]}
